overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a rainy night walk through a neon-drenched futuristic metropolis. The player character moves from an open street lined with holographic advertisements, beneath a concrete overpass, through a covered pedestrian walkway with vending machines, and into an open plaza with trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city street with holographic advertisements

events.description: large blue holographic fish materializes and swims through the foggy sky
futuristic black vehicle drives past on the wet street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rain-soaked sidewalk observing the shifting neon lights of the LED wall

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving along the street with headlights on

entered.detail: curved building facade with shifting neon colors cycling through pink, green, and yellow
massive glowing blue holographic fish swimming through the night sky
tall skyscraper with illuminated yellow MILITECH signage near the top
tall palm tree decorated with red and green lights
tall pole with bright white linear LED light
futuristic vehicles parked along the curb
concrete overpass structure with vehicles moving on top

segments.scene_description: Walking along a rain-soaked futuristic city street at night, passing parked cars beneath a modern street lamp. A massive curved LED wall displays shifting neon colors on the right, while a large blue holographic fish swims through the foggy sky above. The Militech tower looms in the background as vehicles drive past on the wet asphalt.

events.description: turning right to enter the shadow beneath the concrete overpass
large orange holographic fish appears swimming near the Militech building

agents.ego_description: turning right to enter the covered underpass area, continuing forward beneath the highway

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass creating a dark canopy overhead
glowing orange holographic fish with flowing fins swimming near the buildings

segments.scene_description: Turning right to pass beneath a massive concrete overpass, the environment becomes darker and more enclosed. The blue holographic fish disappears from view as an orange holographic fish appears near the Militech building. The colorful LED wall is now visible to the left while the camera moves into the sheltered underpass area.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with vending machines

events.description: entering the covered pedestrian walkway with geometric yellow neon lighting
orange holographic fish swims out of view as the camera focuses forward

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered corridor passing vending machines and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead through the corridor

entered.detail: concrete ceiling with geometric yellow neon light strips along the edges
continuous yellow glowing lines tracing the architectural edges of the corridor
row of automated vending machines with glowing product displays
large illuminated advertisements including brands like NICOLA
thick structural concrete pillars lining the left side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered pedestrian walkway illuminated by geometric yellow neon strips along the ceiling. The corridor features vending machines and bright digital billboards on the right side, with concrete support pillars on the left. A few pedestrians walk through the enclosed space as the camera moves steadily forward toward the distant exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza with trees and green lighting

events.description: exiting the covered walkway into an open plaza with trees and green neon lights
ambient lighting shifts to green tones from the vertical neon pillars

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza surrounded by trees and green neon lighting

entered.detail: mature trees with dense dark foliage scattered throughout the plaza
tall vertical cylindrical pillars emitting bright green light
tall skyscraper with illuminated yellow MILITECH signage

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway into an open pedestrian plaza surrounded by trees and illuminated by vertical green neon pillars. The rain continues to fall on the wet reflective pavement. The Militech tower is now visible to the left, and the environment feels more open with scattered pedestrians walking through the green-lit urban garden space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-soaked futuristic metropolis, moving from a vibrant open street into enclosed urban corridors before emerging into a neon-lit plaza. It begins along a wet asphalt road beneath a foggy sky where a massive blue holographic fish swims above a curved LED wall and the looming Militech tower. As the camera turns right, the environment becomes darker and more enclosed beneath a massive concrete overpass, shifting the visual focus to an orange holographic fish and the colorful LED wall now positioned to the left. The scene then transitions into a covered pedestrian walkway, where the open sky is replaced by a ceiling of geometric yellow neon strips and a corridor of vending machines and digital billboards. Finally, the camera emerges from the shelter into an open pedestrian plaza, where the lighting shifts to vertical green neon pillars surrounding an urban garden of trees and reflective pavement.
